meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. This intermediate-level checklist teaches founders how to leverage Git with AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to ship.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop consuming and start committing. By integrating AI-driven Git workflows, you transform code generation into a structured, versioned asset. Use Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation to bridge the gap between prototype ideas and production-ready, monetizable SaaS products.
content.intro:
You have watched the videos, read the docs, and cloned a dozen repositories, yet your product remains a collection of disparate code snippets. This is the silent killer of SaaS founders: tutorial hell. It is a state of perpetual preparation where you feel busy, but your repository remains empty of value.

The shift happens when you stop treating AI as a teacher and start treating it as your lead engineer. By coupling Git’s version control with the raw horsepower of Antigravity and Claude Code, you turn your terminal into a shipyard. It is time to stop watching and start shipping.

steps.title: Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Define your SaaS domain model before writing a single line of code. Use AI to structure your directory for scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my SaaS idea [Insert Idea]. Generate a production-ready file structure following clean architecture principles, emphasizing modular separation of services.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the file structure based on the architectural plan provided by Antigravity.'

steps.title: Automated Git Initialization
steps.description: Set up your repository with a robust .gitignore and automated branching strategy to maintain a clean commit history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive .gitignore for a [Language/Framework] stack and outline a feature-branching strategy suitable for a solo founder.

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Implement core features using Claude Code to ensure the logic aligns with your Git branch strategy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft the logic for the [Feature Name] module. Ensure it is decoupled from the database layer and ready for unit testing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the module drafted in Antigravity. Write tests first, then implement the code.'

steps.title: Context-Aware Refactoring
steps.description: Use AI to analyze your current diffs and refactor for performance without breaking existing functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current diff in the feature branch. Identify performance bottlenecks and suggest refactors that improve readability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Apply the refactoring suggestions to the current branch and verify with existing tests.'

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Validation
steps.description: Prepare your code for production by automating the validation check before merging into main.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI pipeline configuration file that runs tests and builds the project before allowing a merge to main.
steps.claude_code_command: git add . && git commit -m 'feat: complete core feature' && git push origin feat/initial-setup

pro_tips: Always commit your AI-generated code with descriptive messages that include the prompt intent for future auditability.
Use Claude Code's 'review' feature on your own pull requests before merging to catch hallucinations.
Treat your Git history as your project's roadmap; if a commit is messy, your architectural understanding is likely fragmented.
Force AI to write documentation inside the code comments as it generates; documentation debt is the primary cause of abandonment.
Use Antigravity to generate 'TODO' markers in your code that specifically point to where monetization logic should be injected.
resources: Git Best Practices for SaaS: https://git-scm.com/book
content.next_steps: Once your first feature is merged, define your MVP scope, set a 48-hour deadline for the next release, and begin your customer discovery process.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to build faster than ever. Stop waiting for permission and start building your legacy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
